nodeBudgetPolicy.notes: Effective load is weighted structural burden, not raw LOC alone.

agentOrientation.canonicalDoctrineSurface: AGENTS.md or equivalent canonical doctrine surface
agentOrientation.canonicalControlPlaneSurface: san/control-plane.md or equivalent canonical control-plane surface
agentOrientation.canonicalPreflightSurface: san/preflight.md or equivalent SAN preflight log

Read the topology graph to pick the bounded node
Read the latest SANLOCK scoring log
defaultExecutionEntrypoints: Declare the canonical execution entrypoints for the repo here
defaultVerificationEntrypoints: Declare the canonical verification entrypoints for the repo here
agentOrientation.notes: Optional stateless-agent orientation metadata extending the 3.7 topology template without changing the core node/edge model.

nodes.label: Example bounded node
nodes.notes: Optional stateless-agent hints make it easier for a cold-start agent to jump from topology truth to the right files and commands.
executionEntrypoints: command or runtime entrypoint that primarily exercises this node
verificationEntrypoints: command, script, or checklist that verifies this node
